steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content:
Before the blank: light intensity affects the chemical reaction rate of photosynthesis — a complete independent clause.

After the blank: as light intensity increases, so does the rate at which the reactants are converted into their products — an elaboration that explains how light intensity affects the rate.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon can follow an independent clause to introduce an elaboration or explanation of what came before. Per the answer key, choice C uses a colon to mark this elaboration: photosynthesis : as light intensity increases...

Choice A turns the elaboration into a coordinated clause without proper punctuation; choice B (comma alone) creates a comma splice between two complete clauses; choice D omits punctuation entirely.

The answer is C.
